local_evidence.observed_shape: Claude project JSONL files can contain type=user and message.role=user records with isMeta=true.
local_evidence.example: /Users/example/.claude/projects/-Users-wj--aihub-runtime-workers-glm-G1/79b61ef6-e596-4ce2-9b89-22ac59836b9f.jsonl includes an isMeta local-command caveat record.

candidate.problem: parse_claude_project_jsonl accepted any type=user and message.role=user record, including isMeta=true caveat records generated by the harness.
candidate.risk: Meta/system caveats could be counted as user-authored prompts, contaminating frequency, quality, and repair views.
candidate.decision: Skip isMeta=true records in the Claude project parser before extracting message content.

red.evidence: The new test failed with 2 records instead of the expected 1.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after the parser skipped isMeta=true user-shaped records.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 35 Rust library tests passed, 13 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.
